name: OpenWiki Docs PR Label Update
prompt: A pull request was labeled for OpenWiki documentation maintenance. Inspect the PR repository and branch from the GitHub event payload. Run /openwiki-docs:update focused on the PR changes. If documentation changed, commit only openwiki/** plus top-level AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md changes back to the PR branch and leave a concise PR comment summarizing the docs update. If no docs changes are needed, leave a short comment saying the OpenWiki docs are current.
